---
title: "Environmental Geography"
subtitle: "Human-environment interactions, ecosystems, and contemporary environmental challenges."
author: "Geography Team"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
---





Welcome to the **Environmental Geography** module of Geography OpenCourseWare. This course bridges physical and human geography by examining the complex interactions between human societies and the natural environment — from ecosystem dynamics to contemporary environmental crises.

---

## UGC NET Syllabus

* **Components: Ecosystem (Geographic Classification) and Human Ecology.**
* **Functions: Trophic Levels, Energy Flows, Cycles (geo-chemical, carbon, nitrogen and oxygen), Food Chain, Food Web and Ecological Pyramid.**
* **Human Interaction and Impacts, Environmental Ethics and Deep Ecology.**
* **Environmental Hazards and Disasters (Global Warming, Urban Heat Island, Atmospheric Pollution, Water Pollution, Land Degradation).**
* **National Programmes and Policies: Legal Framework, Environmental Policy, International Treaties, International Programmes and Polices (Brundtland Commission, Kyoto Protocol, Agenda 21, Sustainable Development Goals, Paris Agreement).**

---

{{< include environmental/07-biodiversity-and-its-depletion-natural-and-human-induced-causes.md >}}

{{< include environmental/11-biogeography.md >}}

{{< include environmental/12-classification-and-distribution-of-soils.md >}}

{{< include environmental/08-conservation-and-management-of-ecosystems.md >}}

{{< include environmental/13-course-content.md >}}

{{< include environmental/14-ecology-ecosystems.md >}}

{{< include environmental/15-ecosystem-their-management-and-conservation.md >}}

{{< include environmental/16-environmental-degradation.md >}}

{{< include environmental/17-environmental-education-and-legislation.md >}}

{{< include environmental/09-environmental-hazards-and-pollution.md >}}

{{< include environmental/18-environmental-hazards-and-remedial-measures.md >}}

{{< include environmental/19-environmental-policies-governance.md >}}

{{< include environmental/20-environmental-policy.md >}}

{{< include environmental/02-forms-and-functions-of-ecosystems.md >}}

{{< include environmental/21-genesis-of-soils.md >}}

{{< include environmental/22-global-and-regional-ecological-changes-and-imbalances.md >}}

{{< include environmental/04-grassland.md >}}

{{< include environmental/23-human-ecological-adaptations.md >}}

{{< include environmental/24-influence-of-man-on-ecology-and-environment.md >}}

{{< include environmental/25-major-gene-pool-centres.md >}}

{{< include environmental/05-marine.md >}}

{{< include environmental/06-mountain.md >}}

{{< include environmental/26-natural-hazards-disasters.md >}}

{{< include environmental/10-ozone-depletion.md >}}

{{< include environmental/01-physical-factors-influencing-world-distribution-of-plants-and-animals.md >}}

{{< include environmental/27-principle-ecology.md >}}

{{< include environmental/32-problems-of-deforestation-and-conservation-measures.md >}}

{{< include environmental/03-social-forestry-agro-forestry.md >}}

{{< include environmental/28-soil-erosion-degradation-and-conservation.md >}}

{{< include environmental/29-soil-profile.md >}}

{{< include environmental/30-sustainable-development.md >}}

{{< include environmental/31-wild-life.md >}}
